not_claimed: ordinary list decoding beyond the stated interleaved-list predicate

theorem_assessment.reason_not_proved: Only the RREF-profile mimic rule succeeds, and only on two small 6-column quotient-residual matrices. No deterministic metadata rule succeeds, and the 192-column anchor-relaxed matrices remain RREF-derived.
theorem_assessment.target_statement: For the quotient_residual_rref_pivot class, a metadata-only row schedule selects a full column-rank minor over GF(17^32).
